summary: Invitation management platform that should work without any authentication or login system. Currently fixing UI visibility issues (black background hiding content) and ensuring invitation creation works properly.
architectural_notes: App must function without any authentication - no login, signup, sign out, or account setup components
All auth-related backend checks and UI elements must be fully removed
known_issues: Auth error messages still appearing: 'Your account is still being set up' and 'Please check your connection and try again'
Black background hiding all content, making app unusable

existing_features.title: Fix the black background issue throughout the entire app. Replace all black or near-black background colors with appropriate light or themed backgrounds (ivory, cream, white, or the design system's defined background tokens) so that all content — text, buttons, cards, forms, headers — is fully visible and readable.

Audit and fix CSS custom properties and Tailwind color token definitions in frontend/index.css and frontend/src/index.css to ensure that the default (light) theme does not apply dark/black background values. Ensure the --background and --foreground CSS variables, as well as any body or root background styles, are set to appropriate light theme values by default.

new_feature_requests.summary: Remove all authentication features (login, signup, sign out, account setup) and make app work independently without any login system
Fix black background that hides all content - ensure proper color contrast and visibility throughout the app
